results.title: Phillies roll past Cubs to capture youth Major League championship
results.description: SMITHFIELD — After splitting two regular-season meetings, the Smithfield Phillies saved their best performance for the game that mattered most.

results.title: How Spain’s midfield passing carousel dismantled Didier Deschamps’ French dream
results.description: Despite boasting a devastating attacking arsenal, France failed to muster a single shot on target for 75 minutes in Arlington, leaving a disappointed Kylian Mbappé to reflect on a legacy cut short.

results.title: 7 Singapore bars land on Asia’s 50 Best Bars 51-100 list for 2026, with two newcomers
results.description: The full Asia's 50 Best Bars 2026 top 50 will be revealed at a live ceremony in Macau on July 28, 2026

results.title: AL pitching combines on 3-hitter in 4-0 win, first All-Star shutout since 2013
results.description: Dylan Cease struck out the side in the first inning, combining with 10 relievers on a three-hitter in a show of pitching dominance that led the American League to a 4-0 win over the National League.

results.title: Desiree Scott brings NSL team to Winnipeg
results.description: The Northern Super League has announced its first expansion team for 2027 in Winnipeg. Former NWSL midfielder and Canadian Olympic gold medalist Desiree Scott is a co-founder of the new club and will serve as the Vice President, Community & Player Experience.

results.title: Belagavi: Firing on a man playing rummy at Gymkhana Club
results.description: ಬೆಳಗಾವಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ರಮ್ಮಿ ಆಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಮೇಲೆ ಫೈರಿಂಗ್ ಮಾಡಲಾಗಿದ್ದು, ಕ್ಷಣಾರ್ಧದಲ್ಲಿ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಪಾರಾರಿಯಾಗಿದ್ದಾನೆ. ಘಟನೆ ದೃಶ್ಯ ಅಲ್ಲಿನ ಸಿಸಿಟಿವಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ದೃಶ್ಯ ಸೆರೆಯಾಗಿದೆ.
